name: Castle Dark
short_description: Brand Warcford must track down the evil force plaguing the land in this single player ACTION RPG.
detailed_description:
As a dark force moves through the land  Prince Brand Warcford must track it down and attempt to stop it. 

You must follow the evil throughout the world by raft and ship to discover why it is here and what it wants.

Play as the hero and attempt to save your Kingdom ...or what is left of it.

Enjoy the use of ancient weapons, powerful spells and magical equipment to outfit yourself on your journey. 

Bombs, bows and sorcery- you'll find plenty of tools to aid you on your journey.

Players can take the time to craft their gear or make potions to assist along the way.

Castle Dark is a single player Action RPG.

Develop your character by leveling up and increasing your attributes.

Features trade skills: Fishing, Alchemy, Crafting.

Countless monsters

Numerous Side Quests

Abundance of Treasure

Many hours of Gameplay.
